summary: Completed comprehensive testing of REG round naming functionality with SharePoint convention using underscore separators (Category_Number). All backend APIs and frontend integration working correctly.
passed_tests: Round names use underscore format: Category_N (not space)
Selecting '1980s' in REG dropdown shows '1980s_4' in round name display
Selecting 'Sports' shows 'Sports_5' in round name display
Selecting '1970s' shows '1970s_4' in round name display
Creating REG round saves with underscore-format name
Generated PPTX filename uses underscore format
SharePoint integration working (20 title images loaded)
API caching working (2-minute cache for SharePoint scanning)
Frontend uses API-returned round_name instead of constructing with spaces
Round creation and PPTX generation successful
Rounds appear in list with correct underscore naming
